basic_info.name: Surfplus Surf School / 冲浪家社区·SURFPLUS 冲浪学校 (Riyue Bay Branch)
basic_info.location: No. 1 Nanhai Fishing Village, Riyue Bay, Liji Town, Wanning City, Hainan Province, China (海南省萬寧市禮紀鎮日月灣南海漁村1號)
basic_info.operator: Surfplus / 冲浪家 - independent surf-community brand co-founded by a group of surf enthusiasts; operates the on-site Surfplus surf school + Surfplus Beach Bar coffee/bar concept; community-driven 'surf + beach lifestyle' model
basic_info.opening_date: N/A (natural-ocean surf school established in the Riyue Bay surf community circa 2018-2020) [uncertain]

technical_specs.wave_technology_brand: N/A (natural ocean surf school using Riyue Bay's beach break and point break)
technical_specs.pool_size: N/A - operates in the open ocean at Riyue Bay (~5-7 km of surfable coastline shared with 50+ other clubs)
technical_specs.wave_height: Seasonal average 0.6-2.0 m at Riyue Bay; winter peaks (Oct-Mar) regularly produce 1.5-2 m sets, summer/monsoon waves typically 0.5-1.2 m
technical_specs.wave_types: Mix of beach break (sandbar at Beachie / Nanhai Fishing Village frontage for beginner classes) and adjacent left-hand point break (Main Point / Ghost Hotel for intermediate-advanced students)
technical_specs.wave_count_per_set: N/A (natural ocean sets, typically 3-6 waves per set with 8-15 second intervals)
technical_specs.session_length: 120 minutes per class session (covers ~30 min land theory + ~90 min water training); group sessions can extend with bundled multi-session packages
technical_specs.stance_rotation_schedule: N/A (natural ocean - no daily rotation; left-hand point break works frontside for Goofy, backside for Regular)
technical_specs.wave_type_classification: Beach break (primary teaching zone) plus point break (for progression); suits soft-top funboards for beginners, longboards / shortboards for intermediates

pricing_sessions.price_range: Group beginner class 420 RMB per person (3-person class, 2 hours); 1-on-2 (couple/friends) and 1-on-1 private classes available - pricing typically 600-1,000+ RMB per person depending on tier
pricing_sessions.session_skill_tiers: Beginner 3-person group: 420 RMB / 2 hr (includes 30 min theory + 90 min water practice); 1-on-2 progression class: 2 sessions x 120 min in one day, includes equipment, photography, ISA 1-star assessment and certification fee [uncertain on exact RMB]; 1-on-1 private class pricing on request
pricing_sessions.equipment_rental: Surfboard, rashguard / wetsuit (冲浪服), leash, sunscreen mud (防曬泥) and freshwater shower / locker included in lesson fees; standalone board rental ~80-150 RMB/session, soft-top day rental ~150-250 RMB [uncertain]
pricing_sessions.coaching_fee: Group coaching included in 420 RMB beginner package; 1-on-2 progression coaching ~580-780 RMB per person [uncertain]; 1-on-1 private coaching ~800-1,200 RMB per session [uncertain]
pricing_sessions.coaching_packages: Multi-session progression bundles linked to ISA 1-star and 2-star certification; complete package includes equipment, photography, video and certification; multi-day surf camps available on request [uncertain on packages structure]
pricing_sessions.membership_program: No publicly listed annual or 10-pack membership card; multi-session discounts handled on request via WeChat customer service [uncertain]
pricing_sessions.corporate_team_building: Yes - club accepts team-building events and group bookings; can host beach BBQ + surf intro packages combined with the on-site Surfplus Beach Bar; minimum group size and pricing case by case [uncertain]

experience_guide.best_season: October to March (NE monsoon swell season at Riyue Bay) for intermediate and advanced students; Apr-Sep gentler conditions ideal for total beginners and kids
experience_guide.best_swell_window: October-March: NE swells 0.8-2.5 m, period 7-12 s, offshore NW winds; secondary typhoon swells possible August-September
experience_guide.crowd_level: Beginner classes can fill quickly during Spring Festival, May Day, National Day and weekend holidays; weekday mornings and shoulder months (May, Sep) are quietest; lineup at Riyue Bay generally crowded at Main Point in winter
experience_guide.booking_method: Direct booking via WeChat (官方微信), Dianping (大眾點評), Meituan (美團), Ctrip (攜程), Qunar (去哪兒); walk-in possible at the Nanhai Fishing Village shopfront subject to coach availability
experience_guide.booking_platform: Dianping (大眾點評), Meituan (美團), Ctrip / Trip.com (攜程), Qunar (去哪兒), Xiaohongshu (小紅書), WeChat mini-program / official account, Instagram @surfplus.china
experience_guide.payment_options: WeChat Pay and Alipay (default); cash accepted; international credit cards generally not accepted at the small-shop level
experience_guide.skill_required: All levels - dedicated zero-base Beginner curriculum (theory + balance + paddling + pop-up); intermediate progression to green-wave shoulders; advanced 1-on-1 coaching for point-break technique
experience_guide.age_eligibility: Typically 8-60 years for adult classes; kids' classes available for ages 6-12 with soft-top boards; participants must be able to swim 50 m comfortably [uncertain on exact lower age limit]
experience_guide.child_friendly_score: 3 out of 5 - kids' soft-tops and patient coaches available, beachfront cafe lets parents wait comfortably, but no dedicated kids' enclosed pool and no minimum-height waiver; better suited to age 8+
experience_guide.sup_paddleboard_offering: Not listed as a primary Surfplus offering; SUP rentals available from neighboring Riyue Bay clubs and shops [uncertain]
experience_guide.photography_video_service: Photography and video included in the 1-on-2 progression package; standalone photo/video add-on typically 100-300 RMB; complimentary on-site photos for some private bookings
experience_guide.language_support: Mandarin Chinese primary; some English support from younger coaches and the cafe staff (school's social presence includes an English-language Instagram @surfplus.china); not as foreigner-oriented as Surfway Hainan
experience_guide.accessibility_for_disabled: No publicly listed adaptive surfing program; beach access is sandy with no boardwalks [uncertain]
experience_guide.stance_preference_input: Not required when booking (natural ocean - stance assessed during land theory and adjusted during water session)
experience_guide.safety_notes: Coaches drawn from the Riyue Bay surf community; mandatory pre-session safety briefing; lifeguards on the main beach during posted hours; surf insurance recommended; reschedule must be made >24 h in advance, <24 h is non-refundable
experience_guide.events_competitions_calendar: Surfplus is a community-style school not a competition organizer, but hosts internal Surfplus surf jams, beach parties at Surfplus Beach Bar, and ISA 1-star / 2-star assessment days; students often participate in National Surfing Championships and the Wanning WSL Corona Cero Pro QS held at Riyue Bay each Dec [uncertain on internal jam schedule]

surroundings.nearby_accommodation: Riyue Bay surf-village guesthouses (民宿) 200-500 RMB/night; Sweetome Surf Hotel, Forest Inn Riyue Bay Surf Branch ~400-900 RMB; mid-range resort 600-1,500 RMB; SURFLAND on-resort hotels Yue Chao 越潮 + Yu Yue 御越 from 780 RMB; Le Meridien Shimei Bay 1,000-3,000 RMB
surroundings.on_site_accommodation: Surfplus does not directly operate hotel rooms; the Nanhai Fishing Village location is co-located with various small surf guesthouses and apartments. Surfplus Beach Bar (cafe / bar / restaurant on the same premises) provides on-site dining and lounging for guests [uncertain on integrated lodging]
surroundings.nearby_food: Surfplus Beach Bar on-site (cafe / bar serving coffee, light meals, beachside drinks - rated on Ctrip food channel); Riyue Bay surf village cafes (GROM Music Bar, Surf House Cafe), Hainanese seafood restaurants, BBQ stalls, Wenchang chicken; per-person spend 50-150 RMB
surroundings.transport: Self-drive via Hainan East Ring Expressway G98; high-speed train to Shenzhou Station (~10 km / 15 min taxi) or Wanning Station (~30 km); Didi / taxi widely available; free local Riyue Bay electric shuttle 8:00-18:00
surroundings.transport_to_nearest_airport: ~1.5 hours / ~110 km drive from Sanya Phoenix International Airport (SYX); ~3 hours / ~190 km from Haikou Meilan International Airport (HAK); high-speed rail to Shenzhou Station ~15 minutes from the bay
surroundings.combined_itinerary: Surfplus AM lesson + Riyue Bay free surf + Surfplus Beach Bar coffee/sunset + Shenzhou Peninsula resort visit + Xinglong Tropical Botanical Garden + Shimei Bay; complementary to SURFLAND PerfectSwell pool at Riyue Bay (combine pool + ocean for a learn-to-surf weekend)

pros: Long-established Wanning surf-community brand with strong local cred at Riyue Bay's Nanhai Fishing Village
Combined surf school + Surfplus Beach Bar creates a relaxed 'surf + lifestyle' hangout with food/drink between sessions
Affordable group-class pricing (420 RMB / 2 hr) compared to artificial-pool alternatives like SURFLAND
Includes equipment, wetsuit, photography, sunscreen, freshwater shower and ISA 1-star certification in package pricing
Active social media community (Instagram, WeChat, Xiaohongshu) and Ctrip rating around 4.7/5 from 23+ reviews
cons: Limited English support compared to foreigner-oriented schools like Surfway Hainan or Hang5
No dedicated kids' enclosed pool and no formal accessibility program
Wave conditions depend entirely on natural ocean - flat days and crowded lineups in peak winter season
Cancellation policy is strict (>24 h reschedule required, <24 h non-refundable)
Less polished operations and less brand-partnership backing than the new China Tourism Group / SURFLAND ecosystem next door
reviews_reputation.user_reviews: Ctrip rating ~4.7/5 from 23+ reviews praising patient coaches, photography service and the integrated cafe-bar atmosphere; Xiaohongshu and Dianping reviewers describe Surfplus as a 'community-style' school with good vibe and reasonable prices; some criticism around scheduling flexibility and English support [uncertain]
reviews_reputation.recommended_for: Domestic surf travelers (including Mandarin-speaking foreign residents); first-time surfers wanting a relaxed community vibe; couples and small friend groups; those who want surf + beachside cafe / bar in one stop; intermediate surfers progressing to ISA 1-star / 2-star certification
reviews_reputation.operator_brand_partnership: Independent local Wanning surf-community brand; operates in parallel and complementary to the SURFLAND PerfectSwell resort (which opened Nov 2025); part of the broader Riyue Bay 'Tianxin Village / Nanhai Fishing Village' surf cluster of 50+ clubs; not formally affiliated with China Tourism Group or American Wave Machines
